featureName: BUG-056-001: empty non-terminal page advances the persisted pagination cursor past the last real data

executionHistory.summary: Sweep round 18 (regression lens) of spec 056 found fetchEndpointPaginated advances lastNonEmptyToken (the persisted resume cursor) on every page with a next_token, including empty pages. A sparse Twitter v2 result (empty data + next_token) pushes the cursor past the last page with data. Confirmed by a red regression test through the real fetchEndpointPaginated; existing tests only covered the empty TERMINAL page.

Single bugfix-fastlane scope: guard the cursor advance on len(body.Data) > 0. SCN-056-CURSOR-01/02 authored. No contract change (the variable name + ReplayPagination contract already require last-non-empty semantics).

internal/connector/twitter/api.go: advance lastNonEmptyToken only when len(body.Data) > 0; the in-loop cursor still advances every page so pagination proceeds. Comment documents the contract + the regression test.

Scenario-first red->green in api_test.go: TestTwitterAPI_EmptyNonTerminalPageDoesNotAdvanceCursor asserts finalCursor=PAGE2_TOKEN for page1(data)->page2(empty+next)->page3(empty terminal). RED (advanced to PAGE3_TOKEN) before the guard, GREEN after. Adversarial re-RED: reverting the guard re-fails (REVERT_RC=1).
TestTwitterAPI_ReplayPagination + TestTwitterAPI_BookmarksPaginatesAndPersistsCursor + restart/bounds tests preserved; full internal/connector/twitter package green (ok 4.052s).
One guarded assignment + one regression test; no new abstractions.
Deterministic httptest fixture; no new perf hot path; loop remains bounded.
No auth/secret surface; cursor tokens are opaque Twitter pagination tokens. No framework files touched.
artifact-lint PASSED for the packet; go build + vet + full package test green. Evidence in report.md.
Diff confined to internal/connector/twitter/api.go + api_test.go; no migration; no .github/bubbles changes; parent spec 056 artifacts untouched.
api.go comment documents the last-non-empty cursor contract + the regression test.

scopeProgress.title: Anchor the resume cursor to the last non-empty page

lockdownState.reason: bugfix-fastlane single-line guard; no convergence loop required

resolvedFindings.summary: fetchEndpointPaginated advanced the persisted resume cursor (lastNonEmptyToken) on empty non-terminal pages, pushing the next sync tick's resume point past the last page with data.
resolvedFindings.resolution: Advance lastNonEmptyToken only when len(body.Data) > 0; the in-loop cursor still advances every page. Added TestTwitterAPI_EmptyNonTerminalPageDoesNotAdvanceCursor (red->green) and preserved ReplayPagination/Bookmarks contracts.
resolvedFindings.evidence: report.md Test Evidence (RED PAGE3_TOKEN -> GREEN; re-RED REVERT_RC=1); internal/connector/twitter/api.go guarded advance; full package ok 4.052s.
